user.title: Smart Shade Scheduler
user.description: Click Submit to add the integration. Configure rules and settings in the Shade Scheduler panel that appears in the sidebar.

abort.already_configured: Smart Shade Scheduler is already set up.

edit_settings.title: Global settings
edit_settings.description: Rules and modes are managed in the **Shade Scheduler** panel in the sidebar.

data_description.mode_entity: Optional. An input_select (or any entity) whose state is the current mode name. Leave empty if you manage modes directly in the panel.
data_description.tolerance: A cover is only moved if it deviates more than this many percent from the target.
data_description.dnd_start: No automated movements after this time.
data_description.dnd_end: Automated movements resume at this time.
data_description.wipe_time: All manual overrides are cleared at this time each day.
